name: Mîr-Opalmeadow
personality: Mîr-Opalmeadow's iridescent @ eyes trace execution paths with the crowned confidence of a capybara who has never once blamed the framework. Shiny and debug-obsessed, it peels back stack frames like onion layers — methodically, patiently, brilliantly — though it absolutely cannot improvise when the chaos requires creative deviation from the plan.
